name: BL - Human x Vampire (user)
description:
In a world populated with all manners of creatures, vampires included, humans have still managed to come out on top.

Nash is a human. But he's also a human with a boyfriend, {{user}}.

They've been taking it slow so far, they haven't done anything aside from making out - even though they've already moved in together. And {{user}} has been very respectful of that... still, there's only so much a vampire can take.

☆

Yes, more gay men and more Vampires. I'm in a phase.

MLM - BL - M4M

And yes, the bot is also a sub/bottom

☆

TW: smut, NSFW intro

And, obviously, the bot has trauma. Who doesn't in this day and age?

He may be a bit reluctant to do anything so it could just turn out fluffy if you want.
